strategy: Team fight at 17,365 health: hitter, supports, and a healer. Hit with Myth, Life, or Death (+30% incoming); never attack into his 80% Balance resist.
He steals 3 pips from whoever has the most at the start of every 4th round. Plan the big hit for round 3 or 4 so the hitter spends pips before the steal.
If you cannot hit in time, keep pips low: he skips the steal entirely when every wizard has 4 or fewer pips.
Supports Feint and blade the hitter; clear the Arachna Gladiator with AoE or focus the boss.
Funnel to one big hit to grind the 17,365 health.
cheatNotes: Every 4th round he steals 3 pips from the wizard holding the most. Time your hit before it, or keep the hitter's pips spent.
Sometimes the pip-steal deals no damage, just takes pips.
If every wizard has 4 or fewer pips, he skips the steal entirely, a way to deny it.
He also casts a normal Mana Burn separately from the cheat, so expect occasional pip loss anyway.
